subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the All-Merciful hath turned towards the Garden, and when He entered, the pomegranate proclaimed: "The Sovereign King hath come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه توجه الرحمن الی البستان و اذ ادخل نطق الرمان قد اتی المالک الملک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
